reviews.review_description: its a good game but not many people so it takes a while to get in a lobby. Not many gliches, and the game looks nice. And its made by a small team. (i cant find anything that says its been abandoned so no idea if it's true or not.)

developer_response.body:
Bow-Bots was a solo indie project. Due to time and funding constraints, development is no longer active, which is likely why lobbies can take a while to fill. That said, the game is still playable, and I really appreciate you taking the time to play and leave thoughtful feedback.

I do hope to continue development on it one day. For now, I am working on a new project, Scared by Squares, which is in active development. Thanks again for the kind words and for supporting indie devs.

reviews.review_description: This game got abandoned…
Amazing game

reviews.review_title: Great game with much in its future
reviews.review_description:
This is a great game and I could see this being much better in the future, here is an idea to help that, this being a
Loadout system, give us a Loadout to equip different types of bows and make the gadgets part of this loadout instead of found on the map combined with some different types of bots with different stats.

No people but good game with 
good potential

reviews.review_title: This game is so cool and fun
reviews.review_description: I played it with my friend and it was so funny and amazing because hitting those trick shots is everything! The only reason for not 5 stars is because of some network glitches but I am happy because I know this is only the beginning and can’t wait to see what’s next 😊

You really need to give Bow Bots a try! It has an amazing active community on discord where they meet up for matches.
The developer is responsive and gets back to people.
The games visuals and atmosphere are juat unbelievable

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you so much for the kind words! I’m really happy you’re enjoying Bow Bots and connecting with our Discord community. I do my best to respond quickly and help however I can, and I’m thrilled you’re enjoying the visuals and atmosphere we worked so hard on. Thanks again for the support!

reviews.review_description: Just tested this game it is very good and has a lot of potential a few minor fixes, and this game would be an easy 5 star. But in newer updates, try to add new movements such as crouch and jump.

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks so much for trying the game! I’m really glad you’re enjoying what we have so far. We’re currently playtesting a map called The Simulation, where double-jump jet packs are always active. If you have time to check it out, I’d love to hear what you think!

reviews.review_description: It's an amazing game, I love it

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words! I’m thrilled you’re enjoying the game. Your support means a lot, have fun out there!

reviews.review_description: The bow mechanics are very nice! Feels very realistic. The maps are really cool and they have this future primitive vibe that I love. Single player with bots is fun but the game is more fun with a friend so buy your friend who has a quest a copy as well.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome feedback! We’re glad you’re enjoying the bow mechanics and that the “future primitive” vibe is resonating with you, it’s exactly what we were aiming for. Playing with friends definitely adds another layer of fun, so we appreciate you recommending it to others. Thanks again, and have a great time in the game!

reviews.review_title: There are no active players at all
reviews.review_description:
Got this game literally for one dollar, but even for this price it's sort of a scam, because there are 0 (zero) active game sessions to play at any available server. But even if they were, your bot can't crouch, can't jump, can't sprint and the core mechanic - the bow himself - is the worst I ever saw. Like really, guys, there is Archery RED on Steam that was made with sticks and rocks, but it has perfect arcade shooting. I can understand everything, it's an indie game, there are three developers, but you aggressively advertise your game on reddit while there is no player base and core mechanics are bad - aiming and shooting are too junky.

P. S. Not native, but angry speaker, so sorry for mistakes.

developer_response.body: I'm sorry the game didn't meet your expectations. As mentioned in the game description, Bow-Bots is still in early access, and we're aware that there are areas, such as the bow handling, that need improvement. The player base is currently small because we're holding off on major marketing efforts until the game is further developed. Since this is an early version, we're offering the game at a steep discount for players who want to help us test and shape it. Your feedback is valuable to us, and we're actively working on enhancements based on player input. Thank you for giving it a try!

reviews.review_title: This shouldn't be on the store yet
reviews.review_description: This game isn't ready to be sold.  Period.  I was expecting something like AirRanger, a great little pvp bow game that came out years ago for VR.  I don't think this would get a passing grade as a college project.  If your game is in pre alpha, or in the state this game is in, you should not be charging money for it.  If you need testers, make it free until release.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

I'm sorry to hear that the game didn’t meet your expectations. We're still in App Lab and early access, so Bow-Bots is very much in the middle of its development journey. We're a small team of three working on this part-time, and we're doing our best with the limited resources we have.

We offer a 30-minute free trial so players can experience the game firsthand and support its development if they enjoy the direction we’re heading in. I hope you’ll consider giving Bow-Bots another try in a few months as we continue to address bugs and polish the experience.

Thank you for your feedback, it helps us improve.

reviews.review_title: This is a good game but it b could
reviews.review_description:
This goes out to the developers. 
This is a good game but it could be a great game as well if there was the option you could be
 play single player as well!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your feedback! We're glad to hear you're enjoying the game. We're actually working on a single-player mode as well, so stay tuned for updates on that. We appreciate your support and hope you'll enjoy the new features when they roll out!

reviews.review_description: I gave "Bow Bots" a spin on the Quest Store, and I've got to say, it's a winner. This game nails the multiplayer fun without overcomplicating things. The visuals are bright and cheerful, and they won't strain your eyes. Plus, the controls are straightforward, so you can jump right in and start having a good time. Whether you're a casual player or a seasoned gamer, "Bow Bots" is a great pick. It's a hit for all ages!

reviews.review_title: This is going to be a future top seller!
reviews.review_description: Graphics and map design are amazing in this game. The gameplay is also super fun and unique. Had a ton of fun playing with my friends. I highly recommend.

I was looking for a cooperative / competitive bow shooter, and I am very excited for this game.  I came across it in a reddit post, and it surprised me how good it is.  It is perhaps unfair to give this a 4 star as it is only an Alpha 2, but there are a quite a few areas that still need polish (ngl).  However, you can easily see the potential once you play a round.  In many ways it reminds me of HyperDash (a game I still love).  The small team behind this game is really focused on making this an incredible experience.  Wholeheartedly recommended.

developer_response.body: Hi! I'm really glad to hear you're enjoying what we've done so far! We've recently tackled most of the major game-breaking bugs, and now we're focusing on polishing things up. I’m excited to hear what you think once those updates are in place. Thanks again for the support!

reviews.review_description: Wasn't expecting much from this but did have a good time playing. However, some aspects of the game could do with some tweaking mainly how the bow is fired. Developers take note of other bow games and apply similar firing mechanics. At the moment firing the bow is a struggle in itself and I am guessing that that is the reason for a low player base. The game is fun but it needs a lot of tweaking and polish. As it stands now: would wait for sale  to purchase.

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying our game and sharing your thoughts! We’ve made some adjustments to the bow and would love to hear what you think. We hope you’ll check it out again soon.

reviews.review_description: There is no multiplayer there’s no multiplayer I tried. No one is in here. This game is Waze but I paid $.15 nobody’s online

developer_response.body:
Thanks for reaching out! Bow-Bots is currently in early access, and we’re still working on finishing the game. As noted in our description, the player base is small, and we recommend inviting a friend for the best experience.

Since we’re not actively advertising yet, full lobbies aren’t common, but we’re working hard to grow the community. You can also join our [Discord/Community Hub] to find other players.

We appreciate your support and patience as we continue improving!

reviews.review_description:
Still work in Progress

Graphics 7
Sounds 7

Arenas are colourful, remind me of playing laser quest games with friends years ago.
Also the arenas remind me in a good way, of some of the first arena battle style games on the pc.

Lots of various bows and arrows.
Also items like shield, speed, jet pack to collect.

Can play against human or AI.

Hard to rate a game that needs work but is still in development… so will have to mark it as average at this moment, as it’s hard to judge an incomplete game.

Still a work in progress and needs stuff adding, changing and fixing.

developer_response.body: Hello! I’m so glad to hear you enjoyed the level design, it’s my favorite thing to work on! As you mentioned, we’re still deep in development, so there’s plenty of debugging and community building ahead. I hope you’ll give the game another shot in a few months when we’ve had more time to polish things up!

reviews.review_description: This is an Incredibly well made game and a must have for anyone whether they just started vr or have been playing vr for a while. Download it for yourself and see just how great it is!
